title: Delete Semantic Type
content:
# Delete Semantic Type

Permanently delete an existing Semantic Type. An error will be returned if there are any current links to a Semantic Type. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /datastreams/semantic-types/{semantic_type_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.datastreams.deleteDataStreamSemanticType()
print(response)

parameters.name: semantic_type_name
parameters.description: Semantic Type key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
